name: Select → Previous
description: This is an [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) for selecting the previous option in a select component.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the select to set.

config_entries.label: Cycle
config_entries.description: Whether or not to jump to the last option of the select when the first option is currently selected. Defaults to `true`.
